001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.historyLog;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.HistoryLogProps;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
006
007@HistoryLogProps(
008    opCode = 30,
009    displayName = "Reminder Snoozed",
010    internalName = "LID_REMINDER_SNOOZED"
011)
012public class ReminderSnoozedHistoryLog extends HistoryLog {
013
014    private long reminderId;
015
016    public ReminderSnoozedHistoryLog() {}
017    public ReminderSnoozedHistoryLog(long pumpTimeSec, long sequenceNum, long reminderId) {
018        super(pumpTimeSec, sequenceNum);
019        this.cargo = buildCargo(pumpTimeSec, sequenceNum, reminderId);
020        this.reminderId = reminderId;
021    }
022
023    public ReminderSnoozedHistoryLog(long reminderId) {
024        this(0, 0, reminderId);
025    }
026
027    public int typeId() {
028        return 30;
029    }
030
031    /**
032     * <table border="1">
033     * <caption>Parsed fields for ReminderSnoozedHistoryLog:</caption>
034     * <tr><td><code>reminderId</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 10)</code></td></tr>
035     * </table>
036     */
037    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
038        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == 26);
039        this.cargo = raw;
040        parseBase(raw);
041        this.reminderId = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 10);
042    }
043
044    public static byte[] buildCargo(long pumpTimeSec, long sequenceNum, long reminderId) {
045        return HistoryLog.fillCargo(Bytes.combine(
046            new byte[]{30, 0},
047            Bytes.toUint32(pumpTimeSec),
048            Bytes.toUint32(sequenceNum),
049            Bytes.toUint32(reminderId)));
050    }
051
052    public long getReminderId() {
053        return reminderId;
054    }
055
056}
